title: Stylish Occult
description: Runes (and more...) straight from the occult!
body:
Stylish Occult

Fabric mod | Runes (and more...) straight from the occult!


Description

Stylish Occult is a tech mod in disguise (kinda like Botania). From the outside it looks like an all-out magic mod, but under the hood the tools it provides are technical and require some thinking to apply correctly. The mod is focused on creation and usage of special runes that can be utilized to create highly advanced contraptions and automate certain tasks (like, for example, crafting) all of this in a occult themed package! It also adds a nether structure called Sanctum that you will need to "visit" at some point of your journey, and some other minor things.

Have you found a bug or incompatibility? Please report it on my Issue Tracker, if you would like to ask some questions feel free to join my Discord. Also be sure to check out the Gallery tab for some screenshots! **This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) to function.**

Features

- Ancient runes found in nether that can be used to make contraptions and automate some tasks - Structures in the Nether (Sanctums) and Overworld (Stone Circles) - Lava demons - monsters made of blocks sleeping in cave walls - Fleshy growths in the nether, that can be used to farm Occult Ingredients - Detailed in-game book and advancements to guide your journey through the world of occult magic - Dark Altar that can be used to construct more runes
